name: OpenWeatherMap
description: OpenWeatherMap provides comprehensive weather data for any location worldwide. The API offers current conditions, 5-day/3-hour forecasts, One Call API 3.0 (current + minutely + hourly + daily + alerts), air pollution data, and geocoding. Data includes temperature, humidity, wind, pressure, precipitation, UV index, and visibility.

capabilities.name: weather_current_get
capabilities.description: Get current weather conditions for a location.

capabilities.name: onecall_get
capabilities.description: Get comprehensive weather: current, minutely, hourly, daily forecasts, and alerts in one call.

capabilities.name: onecall_timemachine_get
capabilities.description: Get historical weather data for a specific past date via One Call API.

capabilities.name: onecall_day_summary_get
capabilities.description: Get aggregated weather data for a specific date via One Call API.

capabilities.name: air_pollution_current_get
capabilities.description: Get current air quality data with AQI and pollutant concentrations.

capabilities.name: air_pollution_forecast_get
capabilities.description: Get air pollution forecast for the next 4 days.

capabilities.name: geocode_direct
capabilities.description: Convert city name to geographic coordinates.
